result:
If I could change one thing, I would want everyone to truly understand - not just intellectually but viscerally - how deeply interconnected we all are. Not in some abstract way, but the real, practical truth that your wellbeing and mine are inextricably linked, that harm anywhere ultimately touches everyone.

I think so much cruelty and short-sightedness comes from the illusion of separateness. If people really felt how their actions ripple outward, how another's suffering diminishes us all, how another's joy enriches us all... I believe that understanding would naturally lead to more compassion, wiser choices, better cooperation.

It wouldn't solve everything instantly, but it might be the shift in perspective that makes all other positive changes possible.
